name: Port
description: Internal developer portal for service catalog and developer self-service.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Port at https://app.getport.io
2. Click the ... button in the top right corner
3. Click Credentials
4. Copy the Client ID and Client Secret
5. Enter your region: 'eu' (default) or 'us'
6. Enter the values below

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Port > click ... (top right) > Credentials

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Port > click ... (top right) > Credentials

credentialFields.label: Region
credentialFields.helpText: eu or us. Default: eu. US customers use api.us.port.io

checks.name: Port App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Port API is accessible.

checks.name: Port Employee Access
checks.description: Lists Port organization users to verify access management.
